steps.title: Use the map problem
steps.content: Tracking pedestrian activity can produce incomplete sidewalk maps because sidewalks with few pedestrians may be left out. The blank must mean fails to account for or overlooks.

steps.title: Match the omission
steps.content: Choice A means overlooks, matching incomplete maps. Choice B means supervises, which does not fit. Choice C means endorses. Choice D means finds, the opposite of the problem described. The answer is A.
